name: marksync-bun-compile-smoke
description: GH-13 / MS2-E1-S3 — Bun single-binary cross-compile smoke spike (standalone, not published). Validates ADR-0001 C-2/C-3 (single binary, cross-platform) for the MS-0002 Linux+Windows slice.
//: Standalone spike workspace for GH-13 (MS2-E1-S3). Self-contained; intentionally NOT coupled to the main marksync-cli package (no root package.json yet — repo is pre-scaffolding). Run via Bun 1.1.34 (DEC-2) only.
